title: valeriana officinalis subsp. excelsa
intro: Valeriana officinalis subsp. excelsa, also known as tall valerian, is a subspecies of the valerian plant (Valeriana officinalis) characterized by its taller growth habit and more robust foliage. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oils, particularly valerenic acid, which have been shown to possess sedative and anxiolytic effects. The health benefits of using tall valerian include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety and stress, and relief from symptoms of insomnia and restlessness, making it a popular natural remedy for promoting relaxation and calmness. Tall valerian is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and experience its therapeutic benefits.
